name: Dilly Roast Beef Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese, dill weed, garlic powder, and pepper in a small bowl.
2. Spread the mixture on one slice of bread.
3. Arrange the remaining slices of bread, roast beef, tomatoes, and alfalfa sprouts on top of the spread.
4. Place the other slice of bread on top to complete the sandwich.
